purpose: Rework Step 4 of plugins/base/commands/next.md to branch on the `mode` variable set by Step 0. Implement the auto branch fully (no prompt, one-line notice, first-actionable-in-document-order selection, fall-through to Step 5). Provide a clearly-labeled stub for the detail branch (S3's scope). Re-position the question-halt invariant so it fires before the mode branch.

public_api.name: Step 4 — Mode-Gated Dispatch
public_api.signature: mode: string ('auto' | 'detail'), candidates: ordered list of actionable findings from Step 3 → selected_candidate: finding | halt
public_api.description: Consumes the `mode` variable from Step 0 and the classified findings from Step 3. In auto mode: prints one notice line, selects the first actionable in document order, falls through to Step 5 with that candidate. In detail mode: stub — implemented by S3. Before branching: checks question-halt invariant.

owned_data: selected_candidate — the single finding passed to Step 5
dependencies_allowed: ModeVariable seam (set by Step 0, consumed here)
dependencies_forbidden: Any file write, Edit, or log emission inside auto branch
Any agent spawn or Skill call inside Step 4 (dispatching is Step 6's job)
Raw $ARGUMENTS re-parsing (Step 0 is the sole parser)
events_emitted: One-line UX notice 'Dispatching as <classification>: <truncated-bullet>' (auto branch only, not logged)
events_consumed: ordered actionable findings list from Step 3
test_targets: AC-AUTO-1: no AskUserQuestion in auto branch
AC-AUTO-2: notice line 'Dispatching as <classification>: <truncated-bullet>' present in auto branch prose
AC-AUTO-3: selection rule 'first actionable in document order' named explicitly in auto branch
AC-INV-1: question-halt check precedes the mode branch — left in Step 3 (already before Step 4) with explicit cross-reference at Step 4's preamble
VQ-02-008: detail branch stub present and contains no S3 implementation
question_halt_positioning_decision: Leave the question-halt logic in Step 3 where it already sits (textually before Step 4 in the document). Add an explicit cross-reference paragraph at the top of Step 4's prose stating that the question-halt check in Step 3 applies before this branch, satisfying AC-INV-1 without duplicating or moving the logic. This is cleaner than restating the check verbatim inside Step 4.
